heroTitle: Worry less about money, live life to the fullest.
heroSubtitle: A simple, smart personal finance app to help you control spending and achieve every savings goal.
heroSocialProof: Join 10,000+ Vietnamese who have mastered their finances
bento1Desc: Every expense in sight. Log transactions in seconds and let us categorize them automatically.
bento2Desc: Set limits for each category and get alerts before you exceed them.
bento3Desc: Turn dreams into reality. Create goals and track your progress every day.
bento4Desc: Understand your financial health with simple, easy-to-read charts.
contactEmailSupportDesc: We are always ready to assist you 24/7
modalLogoDesc: Official logo of FinanceTracker - Personal Finance Management Application
testimonial1Quote: "Thanks to the app, I saved 5 million VND for my Da Lat trip without feeling restricted."
testimonial2Quote: "The interface is so easy to use. It's the first time I've found managing expenses this simple."
securityDesc: Your data is encrypted and absolutely protected. We never sell your information.
finalCtaTitle: Ready to take control of your financial future?
finalCtaReassurance: No credit card required. Sign up in 2 minutes.

invest.title: Investment & Markets
invest.subtitle: Track financial market prices in real-time
invest.tipText: Prices shown in USD, auto-updated every 60 seconds. This is reference data, not investment advice.
invest.foreignStocksDesc: Track AAPL, GOOGL, TSLA, NVDA and hundreds of major stocks on NYSE, NASDAQ.
invest.goldDesc: Update SJC gold prices, local gold bars and world gold price (XAU/USD).
invest.vnStocksDesc: Track VN-Index, VNM, VIC, HPG and stocks listed on HoSE, HNX.
invest.corsDesc: Yahoo Finance blocks direct browser requests (CORS policy). To view live stock data, visit the official links below.
invest.stocksTip: Data sourced from Yahoo Finance. Prices shown in USD. This is reference data, not investment advice.
invest.vnTip: Data sourced from TCBS. Prices shown in VND. Reference only, not investment advice.
invest.goldDisclaimer: * Rate: 1 USD ≈ estimated rate. Actual prices may differ from SJC domestic gold.
invest.portfolioEmpty: No positions yet. Add your first investment.
invest.portfolioDisclaimer: P&L is calculated using current market prices. Crypto prices are converted at ~25,400 VND/USD. This is reference data only.
invest.searchToAddCoin: Search coin to add to portfolio...
invest.noTransactions: No transactions yet. Add your first transaction.

sepayOAuth2Desc: Connect your SePay account to automatically sync bank accounts and receive real-time transaction notifications

sepayConnectSuccess: SePay account connected successfully! Bank accounts synced and webhooks created.
sepayConnectError: Failed to connect SePay account. Please try again.
sepayDisconnectError: Failed to disconnect SePay account. Please try again.
sepayCallbackWait: Please wait while we establish the connection.
sepayCallbackSuccessDesc: Your SePay account has been connected. Bank accounts have been synced and webhooks are set up for real-time updates.

modal.title: Create Plan
modal.planTypeShortTerm: Short-term (with clear start and end dates, usually < 3 months)
modal.planTypeLongTerm: Long-term (can last many months/years, often directional)
modal.dayOfMonthHint: If you select 31, the system will automatically use the last day of the month (28, 29, or 30 depending on the month).
modal.applyForWholeMonthHint: The plan will apply for the whole month, no need to select a specific day.
modal.applyForWholeYearHint: The plan will apply for the whole year, no need to select a specific day.
